name: obsidian-knowledge
description: Self-evolving knowledge agent for Obsidian — from a quick capture to a full course build, for any subject. Matches structure to the material, fits your vault, and learns your conventions from each run.

interface.shortDescription: Self-evolving knowledge agent for your Obsidian vault
interface.longDescription: Talk to your Obsidian vault in plain language — save a link, organize your inbox, or ingest a whole syllabus into course-grade notes. It matches effort to the material, fits your vault's conventions, writes notes that teach, and reflects on each run to improve its own rules.
defaultPrompt: Save this link to my vault.
Ingest the syllabus in Inbox into a full course build.
